description: Identify and resolve duplicate patient records for 'DUPONT Marie-Claire' (born 1967-04-12). Two records exist: one has the address but no phone, the other has the phone but incomplete name/address. Consolidate all information into a single record containing the name DUPONT, first name Marie-Claire, DOB 1967-04-12, address 15 Rue de la Paix, city Paris, zip 75002, phone 0145678901, and SSN 2670475002123. Delete the duplicate record and create a report at /home/ga/merge_report.txt listing the GUID of the kept record and the GUID of the deleted record.
